text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Today's dessert was super buono too! I'm so full...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What's that big sigh about, Maya?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well... I'm trying to maneuver away from sweet
stuff for a while...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What?! But you love sweet snacks and desserts!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't say that out loud! I do love sweet stuff, but if I punch out now, I'll never become a proper adult.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Even if I've got visuals on a delicious dessert or a
fluffy carrot mousse, I have to hold off until I'm
back to my ideal racing weight!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Maya... If that's your goal, then leave
everything to me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! This is tofu pudding, and this jelly is
made from agar-agar! This cake's low-calorie too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Bono, you made all this... just for me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I did! I love seeing how happy you look when
you're eating, so c'mon. Let's enjoy the food
together! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Hishi Akebono's switching all her own
snacks to low-calorie equivalents has helped her
maintain her own weight, too!
